items.title: VI Live: Mijnans schiet AZ op 2-0 tegen FC Noah en op rand van volgende ronde
items.summary: AZ hoopt donderdagavond de achterstand tegen FC Noah weg te poetsen. De Alkmaarders verloren in Armenië met 1-0. Of dat lukt, volg je in deze VI Live.

items.title: Ook Brobbey twijfelgeval voor Oranje na blessurenieuws uit Sunderland
items.summary: Brian Brobbey staat twee tot vier weken aan de kant door een blessure. Een mogelijke terugkeer bij Oranje na een jaar afwezigheid staat daardoor op de tocht. Dat heeft zijn manager Régis Le Bris van Sunderland verteld richting de competitiewedstrijd tegen Bournemouth.

items.title: Nottingham Forest v Fenerbahce: Europa League knockout round playoff, second leg – live
items.summary: ⚽ Europa League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Read today’s Football Daily | Mail Daniel On the telly, they’ve just been discussing James McAtee, and I’m looking forward to seeing how he does tonight. City are now in that spot United were under Alex Ferguson, where clubs buy their players because they know the standard can be too high for good ones to make it and respect the managers who keep them around. He’s got a lovely touch and decent vision, but does he have the ability to impose that? We don’t yet know. Forest actually did pretty well to keep as many players as they did after last season – and getting £52m+£3m for Anthony Elanga was a remarkable piece of business. I’m not sure Anderson will still be around after the summer, whereas Gibbs-White has a contract – but there surely comes a point at which players don’t trust Marinakis with their careers and just want to up sticks from the upheaval. Continue reading...

items.title: Fiorentina voorkomt afgang tegen Poolse club, Stuttgart overleeft hectisch begin
items.summary: VfB Stuttgart heeft zich donderdagavond ten koste van Celtic geplaatst voor de achtste finale van de Europa League. Het dreigde na een klinkende overwinning in Schotland thuis even in de problemen te komen, maar zover kwam het niet.

items.title: Celtic save face in Stuttgart but Europa League miracle proves out of reach
items.summary: Martin O’Neill delivered a little piece of history in what will surely be his final game in Europe as a manager. O’Neill created such wonderful European memories for Celtic’s support during his first tenure as the manager that departing with a smile felt entirely valid. In Stuttgart, Celtic won their first ever competitive game in Germany. It took them 17 attempts. Luke McCowan’s goal after 33 seconds was irrelevant in the broader context of this tie. Stuttgart’s 4-1 canter in Glasgow a week earlier ensured that. Still, a game that had the whiff of irrelevance for Celtic delivered cheer. The statistics will show Stuttgart spent much of the evening camped in Celtic’s half but the Scottish champions played with a diligence and discipline that it worthy of great credit. Sebastian Tounekti should even have scored a second Celtic goal in the closing minutes. By then, Stuttgart were going through the motions. Continue reading...

items.title: Sutton's predictions v Oli Fox of Good Neighbours
items.summary: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on Oli Fox from indie band Good Neighbours, plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.

items.title: Demichelis moet Real Mallorca redden
items.summary: Real Mallorca dreigt La Liga na vijf seizoenen weer te moeten verlaten. De nummer achttien van Spanje heeft nu zijn hoop gevestigd op Martín Demichelis, die de eilandbewoners voor degradatie moet behoeden.

items.title: Op deze zender wordt return AZ tegen FC Noah in Conference League uitgezonden
items.summary: AZ speelt donderdagavond de return in de tussenronde van de Conference League. De ploeg van Leeroy Echteld heeft wat goed te maken tegen FC Noah na de 1-0 nederlaag in Armenië. Voetbal International zet uiteen waar dat duel wordt uitgezonden.

items.title: Wigan Warriors vs Leigh Leopards latest score
Celtic salvage pride despite Europa League exit with victory in Stuttgart
items.summary: Celtic salvaged some pride despite exiting the Europa League at the hands of Stuttgart 4-2 on aggregate as Luke McCowan's first-minute strike earned them a first-ever victory in Germany.

items.title: Chelsea made English record £355m loss in 2024-25 season, Uefa data reveals
items.summary: Deficit is the highest ever recorded by an English club BlueCo partner Strasbourg also lost £69m in same period Chelsea made a financial loss of £355m in the 2024-25 season, according to new data released by Uefa, the biggest deficit ever recorded by an English football club. According to Uefa, Chelsea’s losses were about £186m higher than the second-worst losses in Europe, the £171m figure posted by Lyon. The figures are also about £260m worse than those posted by the Blues in 2023-24. Continue reading...

items.title: Klopp's job at risk? 'Nonsense,' says Red Bull
items.summary: Red Bull backed former Liverpool manager Jürgen Klopp to remain the drinks giant's head of global soccer and dismissed a media report that his job could be under threat after barely a year.

items.title: LaLiga will 'try again' to play league game in U.S.
items.summary: The Spanish soccer league wants to resurrect plans to stage a regular-season game in the United States.

items.title: Ronaldo buys 25% stake in Spanish club Almeria
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo has acquired a 25% ownership stake in Spanish second division club UD Almeria.

items.title: Benfica deny Prestianni admitted to using racial insult towards Vinicius Jr
items.summary: Benfica have denied reports that Gianluca Prestianni admitted to team-mates that he had used a racial insult towards Real Madrid's Vinicius Jr.

items.title: Premier League Darts LIVE! Price beats MVG after Littler and Humphries dumped out
Spurs relegation fight toughest of career - Tudor
items.summary: Tottenham interim manager Igor Tudor says trying to save the club from Premier League relegation is "probably" the toughest challenge of his career.

items.title: How have Chelsea made biggest loss in English football history?
items.summary: Chelsea recorded a pre-tax loss of £355m for 2024-25 - the highest loss ever made by an English football club - according to financial figures released by Uefa. How did it happen?

items.title: ‘Premflix’ app to screen all Premier League matches live – but only in Singapore
items.summary: Premier League to have its own streaming service Shock move to sell direct to viewers in place next season The Premier League is to launch its own streaming service, with live coverage of all 380 matches over a season available directly to fans – but only if you live in Singapore. Known as Premier League Plus, the new app will be launched before next season and will be the first time match coverage will be sold direct to consumers. Continue reading...

items.title: Fans of richest PL clubs pay £74 per match as ticket revenue soars
items.summary: Fans of the Premier League's six wealthiest clubs are paying an average of £74 per ticket for each match they attend, while ticket revenues are soaring, according to data from a new report.
